landing.subtitle: Create branded short links, route by geo / device / A-B variant, protect with passwords, and watch clicks roll in — all behind a sub-50ms redirect engine.
landing.feature1Body: Redis-backed lookup with negative caching keeps the hot path under 50ms.
landing.feature2Body: Geo, device, A-B weighted variants, expiration, and password-protected links.
landing.feature3Body: Per-link stats by country, device, referrer and day — written async, never blocking.

auth.registerSubtitle: Get started with MomoLinks in seconds.
